title: Spontex Bathroom Sponge Scourer | Powerful & Non-Scratch | Easy to Grip & Large for Bathrooms/Showers | 1 Count
features: Large size for baths and showers.
Specially contoured nailguard for improved grip.
description: Product Description Spontex Bathroom Sponge Scourer is powerful and non scratch. Thanks to its efficient scrubbing bands, it easily cuts through the dirt and grime that tends to build up in your bathroom. It's ideal to use on all delicate surfaces including enamel. Scourer size: 8 x 4 x 13.5cm. Did you know? The scourer is designed with a specially contoured nailguard for improved grip and protection. Spontex Bathroom sponge scourer can be washed and reused multiple times. When it is no longer fit for its intended use why not find it a new purpose like cleaning up gardening and DIY tools. Top Tip: The large size makes it the perfect tool to quickly clean baths and showers. Safety Warning To avoid suffocation please keep the wrapper away from babies and young children.
